title: dupatya xeranthemoides
intro: Dupatya xeranthemoides, also known as a type of flowering plant commonly found in the Himalayan region, belongs to the family of Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dupatya xeranthemoides include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to treat various health ailments.
